langStringTextType.text: Contains the nameplate information attached to the product
HNI Produktentstehung
TRACEpen
Schraube M4
Note: this set of information is defined by SMT drop-in "Address Information"
Fürstenallee 11

Recommendation: property declaration as MLP is required by its semantic definition. As the property value is language independent, users are recommended to provide maximal 1 string in any language of the user’s choice.
Paderborn

Note: country codes defined accord. to ISO 3166-1. Recommendation: property declaration as MLP is required by its semantic definition. As the property value is language independent, users are recommended to provide maximal 1 string in any language of the user’s choice.
DE
Lehrstuhl-Produkte
Note: Country codes defined accord. to DIN EN ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes
Note: CE marking is declared as mandatory according to EU Blue Guide
Note: CE marking is declared as mandatory according to the Blue Guide of the EU-Commission
Note: Approval identifier, reference to the certificate number, to be entered without spaces
Note: format by lexical representation: CCYY-MM-DD Note: to be specified to the day
Note: format by lexical representation: CCYY-MM-DD Note: to be specified to the day
Note: Every property can be used.
Note: The idShort is arbitrary
Note: The use of a displayName is recommended.
Note: Every multilanguage property can be used.
Note: The idShort is arbitrary
Note: The use of a displayName is recommended.
"sample"
Note: Every file can be used.
The idShort is arbitrary
Note: The use of a displayName is recommended.
Note: Every property can be used.
Note: The idShort is arbitrary
Note: The use of a displayName is recommended.
Note: Every file can be used.
The idShort is arbitrary
Note: The use of a displayName is recommended.
Note: Every multilanguage property can be used.
Note: The idShort is arbitrary
Note: The use of a displayName is recommended.
"sample"
Submodel containing technical data of the asset and associated product classificatons
Teilmodell, das die technischen Daten des Assets und die zugehörigen Produktklassifizierungen enthält
TRACEpen
Rendering des Kugelschreibers mit Markierung
Notes or explanations about the image provided
Name of product class in the used classification system
Note: Every SMC with a specific semanticId can serve as a section.
Note: The idShort is arbitrary.
Note: The use of a displayName is recommended.
Statement by the manufacturer in text form, e.g. scope of validity of the statements, scopes of application, conditions of operation.
The Submodel defines a set meta data for the handover of documentation from the manufacturer to the operator for industrial equipment
This SMC defines one handover document that is described by different elements
Identification of the domain in which the given DocumentId is unique. The domain ID can e.g., be the name or acronym of the providing organisation
Identification number of the Document within a given domain, e.g. the providing organisation.

Flag indicating that a DocumentId within a collection of at least two DocumentId`s is the ‘primary’ identifier for the document. This is the preferred ID of the document (commonly from the point of view of the owner of the asset)
Unique ID of the document class within a classficationsystem. Constraint: If ClassificationSystem is set to “VDI2770:2018”, the given IDs of VDI2770:2018 shall be used

List of language-dependent names of the selected ClassID. Constraint: If ClassificationSystem is set to “VDI2770:2018” then the given names of VDI2770:2018 need be used. Constraint: languages shall match at least the language specifications of the included DocumentVersions (below).
Technical specification
Technische Spezifikation
Identification of the classification system. For classifications according VDI 2270 always set to "VDI2770:2018". Further classification systems are commonly used, such as "IEC61355-1:2008".
Language style of the document
Design that partly deviates from the previous
Denotes the focus of the document and has a referential or communicative function, which is to refer to the content, subject matter or theme of the document
Datasheet 123-ABC-456 (en)
Datenblatt 123-ABC-456 (en)
List of language-dependent subtitles of the Document
Product data sheet in English
Produktdatenblatt in Englisch
text note
Technical Datasheet
Technisches Datenblatt

List of language-dependent keywords of the Document. Note: Mutiple keywords are given as comma separated list for each language. Constraint: For each language-depended KeyWord a Title and Summary shall exist for the given language. Note: This can be intentionally a blank.
1pager datasheet
Date when the document status was set. Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

Each document version represents a point in time in the document life cycle. This status value refers to the milestones in the document life cycle. The following two values should be used for the application of this guideline: InReview (under review), Released (released)
Organiziation short name of the author of the document
Official name of the organization of author of the document
Forms a generic refers to-relationship to another document or document version. They have a loose relationship
Forms a generic refers to-relationship to another document or document version. They have a loose relationship

Forms a based on-relationship to another document or document version. Typically states, that the content of the document bases on another document (e.g. specification requirements). Both have a strong relationship

Forms a based on-relationship to another document or document version. Typically states, that the content of the document bases on another document (e.g. specification requirements). Both have a strong relationship
Forms a translation of-relationship to another document or document version. Both have a strong relationship
Forms a translation of-relationship to another document or document version. Both have a strong relationship
MIME-Type, file name and file contents given by the file SubmodelElement

langStringNameType.text: Name of the specific digital file@en

langStringTextType.text: Note: each DigitalFile represents the same content or Document version, but can be provided in different technical formats (PDF, PDFA, html, etc.) or by a link.

Provides a preview image of the DocumentVersion, e.g. first page, in a commonly used image format and low resolution. Note: low resolution e.g. < 512 x 512 pixels. Constraint: the MIME type needs to match the file type. Allowed file types are JPG, PNG, BMP.
Language style of the document
Design that partly deviates from the previous
Denotes the focus of the document and has a referential or communicative function, which is to refer to the content, subject matter or theme of the document
Produktstruktur_MaxBOM_TRACEpen_Kugelschreiber
BOM_000118.csv
List of language-dependent subtitles of the Document
Produktstruktur_MaxBOM_TRACEpen_Kugelschreiber
text note
Technical product structure
Technisches Produktstruktur

List of language-dependent keywords of the Document. Note: Mutiple keywords are given as comma separated list for each language. Constraint: For each language-depended KeyWord a Title and Summary shall exist for the given language. Note: This can be intentionally a blank.
Date when the document status was set. Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

Each document version represents a point in time in the document life cycle. This status value refers to the milestones in the document life cycle. The following two values should be used for the application of this guideline: InReview (under review), Released (released)
Organiziation short name of the author of the document
Official name of the organization of author of the document
Forms a generic refers to-relationship to another document or document version. They have a loose relationship
Forms a generic refers to-relationship to another document or document version. They have a loose relationship

Forms a based on-relationship to another document or document version. Typically states, that the content of the document bases on another document (e.g. specification requirements). Both have a strong relationship

Forms a based on-relationship to another document or document version. Typically states, that the content of the document bases on another document (e.g. specification requirements). Both have a strong relationship
Forms a translation of-relationship to another document or document version. Both have a strong relationship
Forms a translation of-relationship to another document or document version. Both have a strong relationship
MIME-Type, file name and file contents given by the file SubmodelElement

langStringNameType.text: Name of the specific digital file@en

langStringTextType.text: Note: each DigitalFile represents the same content or Document version, but can be provided in different technical formats (PDF, PDFA, html, etc.) or by a link.

Provides a preview image of the DocumentVersion, e.g. first page, in a commonly used image format and low resolution. Note: low resolution e.g. < 512 x 512 pixels. Constraint: the MIME type needs to match the file type. Allowed file types are JPG, PNG, BMP.
Language style of the document
Design that partly deviates from the previous
Denotes the focus of the document and has a referential or communicative function, which is to refer to the content, subject matter or theme of the document
Datasheet 123-ABC-456 (en, de, fr)
Datenblatt 123-ABC-456 (en, de, fr)
List of language-dependent subtitles of the Document
Product data sheet in English, German and French
Produktdatenblatt in Englisch, Deutsch und Französisch
text note
Technical Datasheet
Technisches Datenblatt

List of language-dependent keywords of the Document. Note: Mutiple keywords are given as comma separated list for each language. Constraint: For each language-depended KeyWord a Title and Summary shall exist for the given language. Note: This can be intentionally a blank.
1pager datasheet
Date when the document status was set. Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

Each document version represents a point in time in the document life cycle. This status value refers to the milestones in the document life cycle. The following two values should be used for the application of this guideline: InReview (under review), Released (released)

Forms a based on-relationship to another document or document version. Typically states, that the content of the document bases on another document (e.g. specification requirements). Both have a strong relationship

Forms a based on-relationship to another document or document version. Typically states, that the content of the document bases on another document (e.g. specification requirements). Both have a strong relationship
Forms a translation of-relationship to another document or document version. Both have a strong relationship
Forms a translation of-relationship to another document or document version. Both have a strong relationship

langStringTextType.text: Note: each DigitalFile represents the same content or Document version, but can be provided in different technical formats (PDF, PDFA, html, etc.) or by a link.

Provides a preview image of the DocumentVersion, e.g. first page, in a commonly used image format and low resolution. Note: low resolution e.g. < 512 x 512 pixels. Constraint: the MIME type needs to match the file type. Allowed file types are JPG, PNG, BMP.
This SMC defines one handover document that is described by different elements
Identification of the domain in which the given DocumentId is unique. The domain ID can e.g., be the name or acronym of the providing organisation
Identification number of the Document within a given domain, e.g. the providing organisation.

Flag indicating that a DocumentId within a collection of at least two DocumentId`s is the ‘primary’ identifier for the document. This is the preferred ID of the document (commonly from the point of view of the owner of the asset)
Unique ID of the document class within a classficationsystem. Constraint: If ClassificationSystem is set to “VDI2770:2018”, the given IDs of VDI2770:2018 shall be used

List of language-dependent names of the selected ClassID. Constraint: If ClassificationSystem is set to “VDI2770:2018” then the given names of VDI2770:2018 need be used. Constraint: languages shall match at least the language specifications of the included DocumentVersions (below).
Drawings, plans
Zeichnungen, Pläne
Identification of the classification system. For classifications according VDI 2270 always set to "VDI2770:2018". Further classification systems are commonly used, such as "IEC61355-1:2008".

Date when the document status was set. Format is YYYY-MM-DD.

Each document version represents a point in time in the document life cycle. This status value refers to the milestones in the document life cycle. The following two values should be used for the application of this guideline: InReview (under review), Released (released)

MIME-Type, file name and file contents given by the file SubmodelElement

langStringNameType.text: Name of the specific digital file@en

langStringTextType.text: Note: each DigitalFile represents the same content or Document version, but can be provided in different technical formats (PDF, PDFA, html, etc.) or by a link.

Provides a preview image of the DocumentVersion, e.g. first page, in a commonly used image format and low resolution. Note: low resolution e.g. < 512 x 512 pixels. Constraint: the MIME type needs to match the file type. Allowed file types are JPG, PNG, BMP.

States, that the described Entity is an important entity for documentation of the superordinate Asset of the Asset Administration Shell. Note: typically, such Entities are well-identified sub-parts of the Asset, such as supplier parts delivered to the manufacturer of the Asset.
M4
Stk
Schraube M4
Schraube M4 - Einzelteil
Saves data from different manufacturing processes and process simulations

qualifier.value: Name of SMC is use case or application

langStringTextType.text: Name of the data source of the data used for the LCA
Timestamp of the start of the LCA calculation
TargetOutput of the calculation

langStringDefinitionTypeIec61360.text: Information for a document identity
Informationen für eine Dokumententität
Each SubmodelElementCollection describes a document by standard, which is associated to the particular Asset Administration Shell
Jede SubmodelElementCollection beschreibt ein Dokument (siehe IEC 82045-1 und IEC 8245-2), das der jeweiligen Asset Administration Shell zugeordnet ist
Set of document identifiers for the document. One ID in this collection should be used as a preferred ID
Satz von Dokument-IDs für das Dokument. Eine ID in dieser Sammlung sollte als bevorzugte ID verwendet werden
Information about a document identification entity
Information für eine Dokumentenidentifikations-Entität
Identification of the domain in which the given DocumentId is unique. The domain ID can e.g., be the name or acronym of the providing organisation
Identifikation der Domäne, in der die angegebene DocumentId eindeutig ist. Die Domain-ID kann z. B. der Name oder das Akronym der bereitstellenden Organisation sein
alphanumeric character sequence uniquely identifying a document
alphanumerische Zeichenfolge, die ein Dokument eindeutig identifiziert

Flag indicating that a DocumentId within a collection of at least two DocumentId`s is the ‘primary’ identifier for the document. This is the preferred ID of the document (commonly from the point of view of the owner of the asset)

Flag, das angibt, dass eine DocumentId innerhalb einer Sammlung von mindestens zwei DocumentIds die „primäre“ Kennung für das Dokument ist. Dies ist die bevorzugte ID des Dokuments (üblicherweise aus Sicht des Eigentümers des Assets)
Set of information for describing the classification of the Document according to ClassificationSystems
Satz von Informationen zur Beschreibung der Klassifizierung des Dokuments gemäß Klassifizierungssystemen
Information about a document classification entity
Information für eine Dokumentenklassifikations-Entität
Unique ID of the document class within a classficationsystem
Eindeutige ID der Dokumentenklasse innerhalb eines Klassifikationsystems
Name of the class in the classification system
Name der Klasse im Klassifikationssystem
Identification of the classification system
Identifikation des Klassifikationssystems
Information elements of individual Document Version entities
Informationselemente einzelner VDI 2770 DocumentVersion Entitäten
Information about a document version entity
Information für eine Dokumentenversdions-Entität
Language style of the document
Sprachstil des Dokuments
Design that partly deviates from the previous
Ausführung, die in einigen Punkten von der vorhergehenden abweicht
Name of the document
Name des Dokuments
List of language-dependent subtitles of the document
Liste der sprachabhängigen Untertitel des Dokuments
Plain text characterizing the content of the document
Klartext, der den Inhalt des Dokuments kennzeichnet
List of language-dependent keywords of the document
Liste der sprachabhängigen Schlüsselwörter des Dokuments
Date when the document status was set
Datum, an dem der Dokumentenstatus gesetzt wurde

Each document version represents a point in time in the document life cycle. This status value refers to the milestones in the document life cycle. The following two values should be used for the application of this guideline: InReview (under review), Released (released)

Jede Dokumentversion repräsentiert einen Zeitpunkt im Dokumentlebenszyklus. Dieser Statuswert bezieht sich auf die Meilensteine ​​im Dokumentenlebenszyklus. Für die Anwendung dieser Richtlinie sollten die folgenden zwei Werte verwendet werden: InReview (in Überprüfung), Released (freigegeben)
Official name of the organization of the author of the document
Offizieller Name der Organisation des Autors des Dokuments
Forms a generic refers to-relationship to another document or document version. They have a loose relationship
Bildet eine generische RefersTo-Beziehung zu einem anderen Dokument oder einer anderen Dokumentversion. Sie haben ein lockeres Verhältnis

Forms a based on-relationship to another document or document version. Typically states, that the content of the document bases on another document (e.g. specification requirements). Both have a strong relationship

Bildet eine BasedOn-Beziehung zu einem anderen Dokument oder einer anderen Dokumentversion. Gibt typischerweise an, dass der Inhalt des Dokuments auf einem anderen Dokument basiert (z. B. Spezifikationsanforderungen). Beide haben eine starke Beziehung
Forms a translation of-relationship to another document or document version. Both have a strong relationship
Bildet eine TranslationOf-Beziehung zu einem anderen Dokument oder einer anderen Dokumentversion. Beide haben eine starke Beziehung
MIME-Type, file name and file contents given by the file SubmodelElement
MIME-Typ, Dateiname und Dateiinhalt, die von der Datei SubmodelElement vorgegeben werden
Provides a preview image of the Document Version, e.g. first page, in a commonly used image format and low resolution
Liefert ein Vorschaubild der DocumentVersion, z.B. erste Seite, in einem gängigen Bildformat und niedriger Auflösung
Eine Reihe von Daten, welche die Zeitreihe beschreiben und über sie Auskunft geben
A set of data describing and providing information about the time series
Aussagekräftiger Name zur Beschriftung
Meaningful name for labeling
Kurze Beschreibung der Zeitreihendaten
Short description of the time series

Ein Zeitreihen-Datensatz ist durch seine ID innerhalb der Zeitreihe eindeutig und beinhaltet die auf die ID referenzierten Zeitstempel und Variablenwerte. Vergleichbar mit einer Zeile in einer Tabelle
A time series record is unique by its ID within the time series and contains the timestamps and variable values referenced to the ID. Similar to a row in a table
Zeitpunktangabe in Sekunden. Zeitpunkte referenzieren auf die Startzeit des Zeitreihensegments.
Point of Time in seconds. Time points refer to the start time of the time series segment.
Enthält Segmente einer Zeitreihe
Contains segments of a time series
Referenz auf eine Datei von Datenpunkten in aufeinanderfolgender Reihenfolge über einen bestimmten Zeitraum
Reference to a file of data points in sequential order over a period of time
Aussagekräftiger Name zur Beschriftung.
Meaningful name for labeling.

langStringPreferredNameTypeIec61360.text: Description of the time series segment

langStringDefinitionTypeIec61360.text: Kurze Beschreibung des Zeitreihensegments.
Short description of the time series segment.
Gibt an, wie viele Datensätze in einem Segment vorhanden sind.
Indicates how many records are present in a segment.
Enthält den ersten aufgezeichneten Zeitstempel des Zeitreihensegments und stellt somit den Anfang einer Zeitreihe dar. Zeitformat und -skala entspricht dem der Zeitreihe.
Contains the first recorded timestamp of the time series segment and thus represents the beginning of a time series. Time format and scale corresponds to that of the time series.
Zeitraum den das Segment umfasst, dargestellt nach ISO 8601 durch das Format P[n]Y[n]M[n]DT[n]H[n]M[n]S
Period covered by the segment, represented according to ISO 8601 by the format P[n]Y[n]M[n]DT[n]H[n]M[n]S
Der zeitliche Abstand zwischen zwei Datenpunkten (Länge eines Zyklus).
The time period between two time series records (Length of cycle).
Definiert die Anzahl der Abtastungen pro Sekunde für eine regelmäßige Zeitreihe in Hz.
Defines the number of samples per second for a regular time series in Hz.
Zustand der Zeitreihe bezogen auf ihren Fortschritt
State of the time series related to its progress
Zeitpunkt der letzten Veränderung
Time of the last chance
Abfolge von Datenpunkten in aufeinanderfolgender Reihenfolge über einen bestimmten Zeitraum innerhalb eines ausgelagerten Datenfiles
Sequence of data points in sequential order over a period of time within a paged data file
Abfolge von Datenpunkten in aufeinanderfolgender Reihenfolge über einen bestimmten Zeitraum innerhalb eines BLOBs
Sequence of data points in sequential order over a period of time within a BLOB
Referenz auf einen Endpunkt von Datenpunkten in aufeinanderfolgender Reihenfolge über einen bestimmten Zeitraum
Reference to an endpoint of data points in sequential order over a period of time
Gibt einen Standort einer Ressource auf einen API-Server an, über den Zeitreihen angefragt werden können
Specifies a location of a resource on an API server through which time series can be requested
generische Abfrage zum Lesen von Zeitreihen-Daten aus einer API
generic query component to read time series data from an API
Gruppierte abfolge von Datenpunkten in aufeinanderfolgender Reihenfolge über einen bestimmten Zeitraum
Grouped sequence of data points in successive order over a specified period of time
Enthält den letzten aufgezeichneten Zeitstempel des Zeitreihensegments und stellt somit das Ende einer Zeitreihe dar. Zeitformat und -skala entspricht dem der Zeitreihe.
Contains the last recorded timestamp of the time series segment and thus represents the end of a time series. Time format and scale corresponds to that of the time series.
Gruppe von Datenpunkten in aufeinanderfolgender Reihenfolge über einen bestimmten Zeitraum
Group of data points in successive order over a specified period of time
Model entity.
Information about the model file entity. Contains the 3D model file.
Set of file identifiers for the file. One ID in this collection should be used as a preferred ID (see isPrimary below).
Identification of the domain in which the given FileId is unique. The domain ID can be e.g. the name or acronym of the providing organization.
Identification number of the File within a given domain, e.g. the providing organization.

Flag indicating that a DocumentId within a collection of at least two DocumentIds is the ‘primary’ identifier for the document. This is the preferred ID of the document (commonly from the point of view of the owner of the asset).
Information elements of file version entities.
List of language-dependent titles of the Document.
List of language-dependent titles of the Document.
Unambiguous identification number of a FileVersion.
Each file version represents a point in time in the file lifecycle. This status value refers to the milestones in the file lifecycle. Use ValueList “StatusValue”
Date when the document status was set. Format is YYYY-MM-dd.

Forms a BasedOn relationship to another 3D File or 3D FileVersion. Typically states that the content of the file is based on another file. Both have a strong relationship. Constraint: reference targets a SMC “File” or a “FileVersion”.
Forms a generic RefersTo relationship to another 3D File or 3D FileVersion. They have a loose relationship. Constraint: reference targets a SMC “File” or a “FileVersion”.

Provides a preview image of the DocumentVersion, e.g. first page, in a commonly used image format and in low resolution (< 512 x 512 pixels). Constraint: the MIME-Type needs to match the file type. Allowed file types are JPG, PNG, BMP.
MIME-Type, file name, and file contents given by the File SubmodelElement. Preferable use “MIME-Type = model/…”. If file type is not defined, use “MIME-Type = application/octet-stream”
Contains information to retrieve the file from an external host.
Call link to an external file host. If applicable with identifier of the asset inside the URL.
Identifier of the file that is unique within the ExternalUrl domain.
Information about the external file host organization.
Short name of the external file host organization.
Official name of the external file host organization.
Information about how the application programming interfaces (APIs) of the external file host is defined.
Description of the version of the API
Link to the documentation of the API.
Link to the specification of the API.
Information about the source application the 3D model originated from.
Name of the application. Use ValueList “Application”.
Version of the application. Use ValueList “Application”
Unique qualifier of the application. Use ValueList “Application”
Information about the source application the 3D model originated from.
Name of the application. Use ValueList “Application”.
Version of the application. Use ValueList “Application”
Unique qualifier of the application. Use ValueList “Application”
Information about how the application programming interfaces (APIs) of the source application is defined.
Description of the version of the API
Link to the documentation of the API.
ApiSpecificationUrl
Information about the tool vendor organization
Short name of the tool vendor organization.
Official name of the tool vendor organization.
Information about the model providing organization.
Short name of the model providing organization.
Official name of the model providing organization.
Information about the intended consuming application of the 3D model.
Name of the application. Use ValueList “Application”
Version of the application. Use ValueList “Application”
Unique qualifier of the application. Use ValueList “Application”
Information about the tool vendor organization.
Short name of the tool vendor organization.
Official name of the tool vendor organization.
Information about how the application programming interfaces (APIs) of the consuming application is defined.
Description of the version of the API
Link to the documentation of the API.
Link to the specification of the API.
Set of information for describing the classification of the file according to ClassificationSystems.
Unique ID of the document class within a ClassificationSystem.
List of language-dependent names of the selected ClassID.
Identification of the classification system.
Information about the model capability.
Purposes for which the model is explicitly suitable. Use ValueList “ModelPurpose”
Purposes for which the model is explicitly not suitable. Use ValueList “ModelPurpose”
Further information that are embedded in the 3D model file itself. Use ValueList “EmbeddedInfo”
State in the products lifecycle which is represented by the model. Use ValueList “State”
Object type in terms of CAD structure. Use ValueList “ObjectType”
Origin on which the model is based on. Use ValueList “Origin”
Information what was simplified in this [SMC] Model3D compared to a reference [SMC] Model 3D, in this case [REF] DerivedFrom.
Textual description of what was simplified.
Information about what elements were reduced, in comparison to the model this model was derived from. Use ValueList “ReducedElements”
Reference points to a [SMC] “Model3D” on which this [SMC] “Model3D” is based on.
Basic geometric information of the model.
Geometric representation of the asset. Use ValueList “Representation”
Explanation: The measurement unit of the length properties within subordinate [Prop] of this [SMC] Geometry.
Information about the cartesian bounding boxes of the asset.
Information about the kind of bounding box. Use ValueList “Application”
Cartesian reference system of the cart bounding box of the Asset.
Cartesian offset vector of the cartesian reference system
X component of the offset vector. Always state the unit.
Y component of the offset vector. Always state the unit.
Z component of the offset vector. Always state the unit.
Cartesian norm vector of the cartesian reference system
X component of the norm vector. Always state the unit.
Y component of the norm vector. Always state the unit.
Z component of the norm vector. Always state the unit.
Cartesian vector that describes the expansion of the bounding box from a cartesian reference system (CartRefSystem).
X component of the bounding vector.
Y component of the bounding vector.
Z component of the bounding vector.
Cartesian reference system.
Cartesian offset vector of the cartesian reference system
X component of the reference vector. Always state the unit.
Y component of the reference vector. Always state the unit.
Z component of the reference vector. Always state the unit.
Norm orientation vector of the cartesian reference system.
X component of the norm vector. Always state the unit.
Y component of the norm vector. Always state the unit.
Z component of the norm vector. Always state the unit.
